##LOCALITY=Tom's quarry, Kapunda, South Australia, Australia
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Marcus Origlieri
##DESCRIPTION=Parallel aggregates of tabular colorless crystals associated with sprays of white, thin platy aldermanite, R100073, and colorless needle wavellite.
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction
